_comment: Login confirmed fully working end-to-end (2026-07-12): email/password fields (Material-UI floating labels, matched via get_by_label), submit button, and post-login landing page ('Live orders' - the POS live-order board, not a 'Reports' link, which isn't on this page). DineOut's fraud/security check ('Account Verification Needed', approved once via SMS) did not re-trigger on the next run, so it appears tied to something more persistent than a single session - worth revisiting if it starts blocking runs again. The settlements_list_url and its selectors below are still unverified against real page source.
